item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 6min The 18th hole at Augusta
Well, sort of...
The closing hole at The Patch, the publ
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 6min The 18th hole at Augusta
Well, sort of...
The closing hole at The Patch, the public course renovated by Augusta National, is a replica of the 18th hole of the Masters.
The green is especially similar. They even gave us Sunday pin position today. 5 520

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 8min This is East Tennessee State erasure. Cita Jon “JR” Rhoades @jrs_rankings ·
